default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Plan headcount growth and compensation strategy for rapid scaling](https://fathom.video/share/zgdvGzy8xZ9StigRzFdsHYx1xihQx56D?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Aiming for aggressive hiring: \~45 employees by June, \~65 by December](https://fathom.video/share/zgdvGzy8xZ9StigRzFdsHYx1xihQx56D?tab=summary&timestamp=6.0)
  - [Focusing on hiring directors/senior roles quickly to build foundation](https://fathom.video/share/zgdvGzy8xZ9StigRzFdsHYx1xihQx56D?tab=summary&timestamp=12.0)
  - [Balancing equity grants carefully, especially for junior roles (L3)](https://fathom.video/share/zgdvGzy8xZ9StigRzFdsHYx1xihQx56D?tab=summary&timestamp=15.0)
  - [Cash compensation prioritized over equity for L3/L4 roles initially](https://fathom.video/share/zgdvGzy8xZ9StigRzFdsHYx1xihQx56D?tab=summary&timestamp=20.0)
  - [Need to model out full costs to ensure ESOP isn't depleted too quickly](https://fathom.video/share/zgdvGzy8xZ9StigRzFdsHYx1xihQx56D?tab=summary&timestamp=24.0)

## Topics

### Headcount Planning

  - [Current: \~25 employees, 6 "pods" (small teams)](https://fathom.video/share/zgdvGzy8xZ9StigRzFdsHYx1xihQx56D?tab=summary&timestamp=80.0)
  - [Target: 45 by June, 65 by December](https://fathom.video/share/zgdvGzy8xZ9StigRzFdsHYx1xihQx56D?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [Key ratios:](https://fathom.video/share/zgdvGzy8xZ9StigRzFdsHYx1xihQx56D?tab=summary&timestamp=146.0)
      - [8 accounts per pod initially, increasing to 10 later](https://fathom.video/share/zgdvGzy8xZ9StigRzFdsHYx1xihQx56D?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
      - [3 pods per director](https://fathom.video/share/zgdvGzy8xZ9StigRzFdsHYx1xihQx56D?tab=summary&timestamp=189.0)
      - [3 account managers per pod](https://fathom.video/share/zgdvGzy8xZ9StigRzFdsHYx1xihQx56D?tab=summary&timestamp=203.0)
  - [Adding VP layer when reaching \~10 directors (likely 2026)](https://fathom.video/share/zgdvGzy8xZ9StigRzFdsHYx1xihQx56D?tab=summary&timestamp=222.0)
  - [Aggressive hiring needed for foundation, but concerns about maintaining quality/culture](https://fathom.video/share/zgdvGzy8xZ9StigRzFdsHYx1xihQx56D?tab=summary&timestamp=232.0)

### Compensation Strategy

  - [Prioritizing cash compensation over equity for L3/L4 roles](https://fathom.video/share/zgdvGzy8xZ9StigRzFdsHYx1xihQx56D?tab=summary&timestamp=248.0)
  - [L5+ roles (directors, VPs) to receive more substantial equity (10-40 basis points)](https://fathom.video/share/zgdvGzy8xZ9StigRzFdsHYx1xihQx56D?tab=summary&timestamp=268.0)
  - [Considering delayed equity grants for L3s (e.g., qualify after 3 months)](https://fathom.video/share/zgdvGzy8xZ9StigRzFdsHYx1xihQx56D?tab=summary&timestamp=281.0)
  - [Aiming for 50th percentile compensation benchmarks, with flexibility](https://fathom.video/share/zgdvGzy8xZ9StigRzFdsHYx1xihQx56D?tab=summary&timestamp=293.0)
  - [Exploring aggressive bonus structures (e.g., 100% bonus if hitting $20M ARR)](https://fathom.video/share/zgdvGzy8xZ9StigRzFdsHYx1xihQx56D?tab=summary&timestamp=328.0)

### Equity Considerations

  - [Current ESOP pool: \~8% (diluting to 6.5%)](https://fathom.video/share/zgdvGzy8xZ9StigRzFdsHYx1xihQx56D?tab=summary&timestamp=642.0)
  - [Founders diluting to \~57% ownership](https://fathom.video/share/zgdvGzy8xZ9StigRzFdsHYx1xihQx56D?tab=summary&timestamp=646.0)
  - [Balancing equity grants to avoid depleting ESOP too quickly](https://fathom.video/share/zgdvGzy8xZ9StigRzFdsHYx1xihQx56D?tab=summary&timestamp=653.0)
  - [Planning for potential ESOP increase after next funding round](https://fathom.video/share/zgdvGzy8xZ9StigRzFdsHYx1xihQx56D?tab=summary&timestamp=1035.0)

### Financial Modeling

  - [Direct people costs projected at $420k/month by June, $616k/month by December](https://fathom.video/share/zgdvGzy8xZ9StigRzFdsHYx1xihQx56D?tab=summary&timestamp=1540.0)
  - [Additional budget allocated for G\&A, sales & marketing (\~20% of revenue)](https://fathom.video/share/zgdvGzy8xZ9StigRzFdsHYx1xihQx56D?tab=summary&timestamp=1560.0)
  - [Aiming to stay within raised capital without needing to increase ESOP for 6+ months](https://fathom.video/share/zgdvGzy8xZ9StigRzFdsHYx1xihQx56D?tab=summary&timestamp=1655.0)

### Recruiting Strategy

  - [Leveraging current market conditions (layoffs, return-to-office mandates)](https://fathom.video/share/zgdvGzy8xZ9StigRzFdsHYx1xihQx56D?tab=summary&timestamp=1760.0)
  - [Targeting high-quality candidates who may prioritize remote work, interesting projects](https://fathom.video/share/zgdvGzy8xZ9StigRzFdsHYx1xihQx56D?tab=summary&timestamp=1766.0)
  - [Considering global talent pool for cost-effective hiring (e.g., $200k/year in Brazil or Mexico for top talent)](https://fathom.video/share/zgdvGzy8xZ9StigRzFdsHYx1xihQx56D?tab=summary&timestamp=2242.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Bridget to refine headcount model and financial projections](https://fathom.video/share/zgdvGzy8xZ9StigRzFdsHYx1xihQx56D?tab=summary&timestamp=2688.0)
  - [Marcel to review Carta compensation benchmarks and finalize strategy](https://fathom.video/share/zgdvGzy8xZ9StigRzFdsHYx1xihQx56D?tab=summary&timestamp=2712.0)
  - [Determine specific equity grant guidelines for each level (L3-L5+)](https://fathom.video/share/zgdvGzy8xZ9StigRzFdsHYx1xihQx56D?tab=summary&timestamp=2798.0)
  - [Create recruiting fee budget (est. 10% of annual salary per hire)](https://fathom.video/share/zgdvGzy8xZ9StigRzFdsHYx1xihQx56D?tab=summary&timestamp=2974.0)
  - [Explore and model potential bonus structures tied to company performance](https://fathom.video/share/zgdvGzy8xZ9StigRzFdsHYx1xihQx56D?tab=summary&timestamp=3053.0)
  - [Schedule follow-up call to finalize plans](https://fathom.video/share/zgdvGzy8xZ9StigRzFdsHYx1xihQx56D?tab=summary&timestamp=4416.0)

action_items.description: Update Google Sheets headcount model w/ discussed ratios, comp estimates, hiring timeline
Create offer letter for new hire using Albert's template
Pull comp benchmarks from Carta, apply to headcount model
Check Carta admin settings, ensure Bridget has full access to total comp tool
